stories.title: Patterns/Share/Access Stats
stories.shortDescription: A compact summary of shared-link activity.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `stats` to show view, download, and comment counts with accessible full values.

referenceRows.name: stats
referenceRows.description: Array of { label, value, icon? } stat tiles.

stories.title: Components/Navigation/Accordion
stories.shortDescription: An expandable section list.
stories.docsDescription: Pass panels as JSON `items` (`label`/`value`/`content`) and the open panel `value`.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-accordion label="Details" items='[{"label":"Properties","value":"props","content":"Owner, size, and classification."},{"label":"Activity","value":"activity","content":"Recent comments and versions."}]' value="props"></box-accordion>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Alert
stories.shortDescription: An inline message banner.
stories.docsDescription: A titled banner conveying status with a tone, and an optional message body. For richer notices, slot markup (links, buttons) as the default children — they render below the message, and an alert with only rich children still shows.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-alert heading="Upload complete" message="24 files were added." tone="success"></box-alert>

referenceRows.name: (default)
referenceRows.description: Rich body content (links, buttons) rendered below the message.

referenceRows.name: dismiss
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the alert is dismissed.

variants.name: Info
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Heads up" message="Shared links expire in 30 days." tone="info"></box-alert>

variants.name: Success
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Upload complete" message="24 files were added to Marketing." tone="success"></box-alert>

variants.name: Warning
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Storage almost full" message="You've used 92% of your quota." tone="warning"></box-alert>

variants.name: Error
variants.html: <box-alert heading="Upload failed" message="3 files could not be added." tone="error"></box-alert>

variants.name: Rich content
variants.html: Morgan and 2 others were added. Review access

stories.title: Patterns/Preview/Annotation Inspector
stories.shortDescription: A side panel for the selected preview annotation.
stories.docsDescription: Pass a JSON `annotation` object with optional replies, and JSON `actions` for annotation commands.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-annotation-inspector heading="Annotation Inspector" annotation='{"id":"a1","author":"Morgan Lee","body":"Tighten the tagline hierarchy near the hero title."}'></box-annotation-inspector>

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an annotation action is selected.

referenceRows.name: reply-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a reply is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-annotation-inspector heading="Annotation Inspector" message="Selected annotation details." annotation='{"id":"a1","author":"Morgan Lee","body":"Tighten the tagline hierarchy near the hero title.","toolLabel":"Comment","pageLabel":"Page 4","status":"Open","subject":"Hero copy","replies":[{"author":"Avery Chen","body":"Agreed, I will update the draft.","initials":"AC"}]}' actions='[{"id":"resolve","label":"Resolve","tone":"primary"},{"id":"reply","label":"Reply"}]'></box-annotation-inspector>

stories.title: Patterns/Preview/Annotation Thread
stories.shortDescription: A selectable thread of preview annotation entries.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `entries` and optional JSON `actions`; set `selected-entry-id` for pressed state.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-annotation-thread heading="Annotation Thread" entries='[{"id":"a1","author":"Morgan Lee","body":"Tighten the hero spacing."}]'></box-annotation-thread>

referenceRows.name: entry-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an entry is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-annotation-thread heading="Annotation Thread" message="Discussion for the current file." selected-entry-id="a1" entries='[{"id":"a1","author":"Morgan Lee","body":"Tighten the hero spacing.","toolLabel":"Comment","status":"Open"},{"id":"a2","author":"Avery Chen","body":"Resolved after export.","toolLabel":"Highlight","status":"Resolved"}]' actions='[{"id":"resolve","label":"Resolve","tone":"primary"},{"id":"reply","label":"Reply"}]'></box-annotation-thread>

stories.title: Patterns/Preview/Annotation Toolbar
stories.shortDescription: A toolbar for preview annotation tools, colors, and actions.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `tools`, `color-options`, and `actions`; set active state with `active-tool-id` and `current-color`.

referenceRows.name: tool-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a tool is selected.

referenceRows.name: color-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a color is selected.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

stories.title: Components/Layout/App Shell
stories.shortDescription: A responsive application frame with header, nav, main, aside, and footer regions.
stories.docsDescription: Set `heading` plus landmark labels, then slot navigation, actions, contextual aside content, and footer copy.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-app-shell heading="Box Admin" nav-label="Workspace navigation" aside-label="File context"></box-app-shell>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: Enterprise Updated 2 hours ago by Morgan Lee 2.4 GB of 10 GB used

stories.title: Components/Identity/Avatar
stories.shortDescription: A compact person or entity mark.
stories.docsDescription: Shows initials from `name` (or explicit `initials`), optional `src` image, and size/tone variants.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Badge
stories.shortDescription: A compact status label.
stories.docsDescription: A small inline label for status or categorization, in the Box feedback tones. When used as a count, `max` caps the number (e.g. `max="99"` shows `99+`), `hide-when-zero` removes it at zero/empty, and `animate` pops the badge whenever the count changes.

referenceRows.name: label
referenceRows.description: Badge text (or a count when used as a count badge).

referenceRows.name: max
referenceRows.description: Cap a numeric label, rendering values above it as "max+".

referenceRows.name: hide-when-zero
referenceRows.description: Hide the badge when the count is 0 or empty.

referenceRows.name: animate
referenceRows.description: Pop the badge when the displayed value changes.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Badgeable
stories.shortDescription: Overlays badges on the corners of its content.
stories.docsDescription: A wrapper that pins badges to the corners of its subject. The subject goes in the default slot; each corner is a named slot: `top-left`, `top-right`, `bottom-left`, `bottom-right`. Corners with no content are hidden.
stories.sourceSnippet:
<box-badgeable>
  <box-avatar name="Morgan Lee" size="48"></box-avatar>
  <box-badge slot="bottom-right" label="3" tone="brand"></box-badge>
</box-badgeable>

referenceRows.name: top-left
referenceRows.description: Badge pinned to the top-left corner.

referenceRows.name: top-right
referenceRows.description: Badge pinned to the top-right corner.

referenceRows.name: bottom-left
referenceRows.description: Badge pinned to the bottom-left corner.

referenceRows.name: bottom-right
referenceRows.description: Badge pinned to the bottom-right corner.

variants.name: Count badge
variants.html:
<box-badgeable>
  <box-avatar name="Morgan Lee" size="48"></box-avatar>
  <box-badge slot="bottom-right" label="3" tone="brand"></box-badge>
</box-badgeable>

variants.name: Status dot
variants.html:
<box-badgeable>
  <box-avatar name="Alex Kim" size="48"></box-avatar>
  <box-badge slot="top-right" label="●" tone="success"></box-badge>
</box-badgeable>

stories.title: Components/Navigation/Breadcrumb
stories.shortDescription: A file-path trail with overflow collapse.
stories.docsDescription: A breadcrumb trail of folder crumbs. When the path is longer than `max-items` the middle crumbs collapse into an ellipsis (first crumb + last two are always shown). Clicking a crumb emits `navigate` with its value; the last crumb is `aria-current="page"`.

referenceRows.name: items
referenceRows.description: The path: { label, href?, value? } crumbs.

referenceRows.name: max-items
referenceRows.description: Crumbs shown before the middle collapses (default 4).

referenceRows.name: label
referenceRows.description: Accessible name for the nav landmark.

referenceRows.name: navigate
referenceRows.description: Fires when a non-current crumb is chosen.

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Context Menu
stories.shortDescription: A right-click menu anchored to the pointer.
stories.docsDescription: Wraps a target area (default slot). Right-clicking — or Shift+F10 / the ContextMenu key while focused — opens a menu at the pointer, positioned to stay in the viewport. Full keyboard menu (arrows, Home/End, Enter/Space, Escape). Emits `item-selected` with the chosen item.

referenceRows.name: items
referenceRows.description: Menu items: { id, label, disabled?, separator? }.

referenceRows.name: (default)
referenceRows.description: The area that responds to right-click.

stories.title: Components/Collections/Table
stories.shortDescription: A semantic, selectable data table.
stories.docsDescription: Columns and rows from JSON. `selection-mode="single|multiple"` enables row selection: click, Ctrl/Cmd-click to toggle, Shift-click for a range; Arrow/Home/End move focus, Space toggles, Shift+Arrow extends, Ctrl/Cmd+A selects all, Escape clears. Sorting is host-owned — `sortable` headers emit `sort` and you reorder `rows`.

referenceRows.name: rows
referenceRows.description: { id, cells } — cells keyed by column key or positional.

referenceRows.name: selection-changed
referenceRows.description: Fires with the selected row ids.

referenceRows.name: sort
referenceRows.description: Fires when a sortable header is clicked.

variants.name: Selectable
variants.html: <box-table label="Files" selection-mode="multiple" columns='[{"key":"name","label":"Name","sortable":true},{"key":"owner","label":"Owner"},{"key":"modified","label":"Modified","align":"end"}]' rows='[{"id":"123","cells":{"name":"Quarterly Plan.pdf","owner":"Morgan Lee","modified":"Jul 10, 2026"}},{"id":"124","cells":{"name":"Brand Guidelines.pdf","owner":"Alex Kim","modified":"Jun 2, 2026"}},{"id":"42","cells":{"name":"Marketing","owner":"Morgan Lee","modified":"May 30, 2026"}}]'></box-table>

variants.name: Read-only
variants.html: <box-table label="Files" columns='[{"key":"name","label":"Name","sortable":true},{"key":"owner","label":"Owner"},{"key":"modified","label":"Modified","align":"end"}]' rows='[{"id":"123","cells":{"name":"Quarterly Plan.pdf","owner":"Morgan Lee","modified":"Jul 10, 2026"}},{"id":"124","cells":{"name":"Brand Guidelines.pdf","owner":"Alex Kim","modified":"Jun 2, 2026"}},{"id":"42","cells":{"name":"Marketing","owner":"Morgan Lee","modified":"May 30, 2026"}}]'></box-table>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Thumbnail Card
stories.shortDescription: A rich file/grid card with a thumbnail and details.
stories.docsDescription: A gallery card: a thumbnail slot above a details row (title, subtitle, optional icon and action). Set `interactive` to make the whole card a keyboard-activated button that emits `activate`.
stories.sourceSnippet: 📄

referenceRows.name: title
referenceRows.description: Card title (also the accessible name when interactive).

referenceRows.name: interactive
referenceRows.description: Make the card a focusable button that emits `activate`.

referenceRows.name: highlight-on-hover
referenceRows.description: Raise a hover shadow without making it a button.

referenceRows.name: thumbnail
referenceRows.description: The visual (image or icon) shown at the top.

referenceRows.name: icon
referenceRows.description: Small leading icon in the details row.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Trailing action (e.g. an overflow menu button).

variants.name: Interactive
variants.html: 📄

variants.name: Static
variants.html: 📄

stories.title: Patterns/Insights/Bar Chart
stories.shortDescription: A bar chart panel for discrete activity counts.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `points`, `legend`, and `actions`; use string attributes for heading, summary, timeframe, and message.

referenceRows.name: point-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a bar is selected.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-bar-chart heading="Uploads per week" summary="71 uploads" timeframe="Last 5 weeks" message="Steady growth across the quarter." points='[{"id":"w1","label":"W1","value":42},{"id":"w2","label":"W2","value":51},{"id":"w3","label":"W3","value":48},{"id":"w4","label":"W4","value":64},{"id":"w5","label":"W5","value":71}]' legend='[{"label":"Uploads","tone":"brand"}]' actions='[{"id":"open-report","label":"Open report","tone":"primary"}]'></box-bar-chart>

stories.title: Patterns/Item/Bulk Action Bar
stories.shortDescription: A toolbar for acting on a selected item set.
stories.docsDescription: Use count/message attributes with JSON `items` and `actions`; action and clear events include the selected items.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

referenceRows.name: clear
referenceRows.description: Emitted when clear selection is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-bulk-action-bar label="Selection" count="3" message="3 items selected" items='[{"id":"123","label":"Quarterly Plan.pdf","description":"PDF · 2.1 MB"},{"id":"124","label":"Brand Guidelines.pdf","description":"PDF · 5.4 MB"},{"id":"42","label":"Marketing","description":"Folder · 18 items"}]' actions='[{"id":"move","label":"Move"},{"id":"share","label":"Share"},{"id":"delete","label":"Delete"}]'></box-bulk-action-bar>

stories.title: Components/Actions/Button Group
stories.shortDescription: A grouped set of related action buttons.
stories.docsDescription: Pass button definitions as JSON `options`; `value` marks the active option when used as a toggle group.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Button
stories.shortDescription: The primary action trigger.
stories.docsDescription: A labelled button with Box tones and sizes. Emits a `click` event; set `disabled` to make it inert, `is-loading` to show a spinner and block activation, `type="submit"|"reset"` to drive the owning form, and slot an `icon` for a leading glyph.

referenceRows.name: size
referenceRows.description: Compact / roomy size; omit for default.

referenceRows.name: is-loading
referenceRows.description: Shows a spinner and blocks activation (stays focusable).

referenceRows.name: type
referenceRows.description: Submit or reset the owning form.

referenceRows.name: click
referenceRows.description: Fired when the button is activated.

variants.name: With icon
variants.html: <box-button label="Add" tone="neutral"><svg slot="icon" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M8 3v10M3 8h10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"/></svg></box-button>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Calendar
stories.shortDescription: A standalone month calendar grid.
stories.docsDescription: Pin demos with `value`, `month`, and `today` ISO dates so rendering stays deterministic.

stories.title: Components/Collections/Card
stories.shortDescription: A content card with eyebrow and heading.
stories.docsDescription: Surfaces a titled block; put body copy in the light DOM.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-card eyebrow="PDF · 2.4 MB" heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf">Updated 2 hours ago.</box-card>

referenceRows.name: eyebrow
referenceRows.description: Small meta line above the heading.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-card eyebrow="PDF · 2.4 MB" heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf">Updated 2 hours ago by Morgan Lee</box-card>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Carousel
stories.shortDescription: A horizontal featured-content carousel.
stories.docsDescription: Pass slides as JSON `items` (`id`/`title`/`description`).

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-carousel label="Featured" items='[{"id":"one","title":"Launch checklist","description":"Everything before go-live."},{"id":"two","title":"Brand refresh","description":"New tokens and iconography."},{"id":"three","title":"Q3 planning","description":"Roadmap and staffing."}]'></box-carousel>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Category Selector
stories.shortDescription: A compact category filter control.
stories.docsDescription: Provide categories as JSON `options` and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Patterns/Insights/Chart Panel
stories.shortDescription: A generic chart panel with summary, legend, and actions.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `points`, `legend`, and `actions`; use string attributes for title, summary, timeframe, and message.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-chart-panel heading="Usage" message="Weekly rollups across the enterprise." points='[{"id":"mon","label":"Mon","value":12}]'></box-chart-panel>

referenceRows.name: point-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a chart point is selected.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-chart-panel heading="Usage" summary="89%" timeframe="Last 7 days" message="Weekly rollups across the enterprise." points='[{"id":"mon","label":"Mon","value":12},{"id":"tue","label":"Tue","value":18},{"id":"wed","label":"Wed","value":24,"tone":"accent"}]' legend='[{"label":"Usage","tone":"brand","value":"89%"}]' actions='[{"id":"open-report","label":"Open report","tone":"primary"}]'></box-chart-panel>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Checkbox Group
stories.shortDescription: A labelled set of multi-select checkboxes.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated checkbox group. `options` is JSON; `value` is a JSON array of selected values.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Checkbox
stories.shortDescription: A single selectable option.
stories.docsDescription: A labelled checkbox for an individual boolean choice; emits `change` when toggled.

referenceRows.name: description
referenceRows.description: Supporting subsection text shown below the label.

variants.name: With description
variants.html: <box-checkbox label="Email notifications" checked description="Get an email when someone comments on your files."></box-checkbox>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Chip
stories.shortDescription: A compact, optionally removable tag.
stories.docsDescription: A small token for a selected value or filter. Emits `remove` with its `value` when dismissed. Use `tone` for a status palette (`success`/`warning`/`error`/`info`), `size="small"` for a compact form, and the `icon` slot for a leading glyph.

referenceRows.name: remove
referenceRows.description: Fired with `{ value }` when the chip is dismissed.

variants.name: Small with icon
variants.html: <box-chip label="Verified" tone="success" size="small"><svg slot="icon" viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6.5 11L3 7.5l1-1 2.5 2.5L12 3.5l1 1z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></box-chip>

stories.title: Patterns/Share/Collaborator Avatars
stories.shortDescription: A stacked avatar pile for item collaborators.
stories.docsDescription: Use JSON `collaborators` plus `max` to render visible collaborator avatars and overflow.

referenceRows.name: collaborators
referenceRows.description: Array of collaborators with name, id, initials, or src.

referenceRows.name: select
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a visible avatar is selected.

referenceRows.name: overflow
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the overflow chip is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-collaborator-avatars label="Collaborators" max="4" collaborators='[{"id":"1","name":"Morgan Lee"},{"id":"2","name":"Alex Kim"},{"id":"3","name":"Sam Patel"},{"id":"4","name":"Jordan Rivera"},{"id":"5","name":"Robin Cho"},{"id":"6","name":"Casey Ng"}]'></box-collaborator-avatars>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Color Picker
stories.shortDescription: A form-associated color input with optional swatches.
stories.docsDescription: Use `value` for the selected hex color and pass curated swatches as JSON `swatches`.

referenceRows.name: value-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the selected color changes.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Combobox
stories.shortDescription: A filterable single-select combobox.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated combobox. Provide choices as JSON `options`.

stories.title: Components/Identity/Contact Datalist Item
stories.shortDescription: A people-picker row with name and email.
stories.docsDescription: Show a contact candidate with optional selected state.

stories.title: Patterns/Content Explorer/Content Explorer
stories.shortDescription: Folder browsing with host chrome; metadata query is a separate host composition.
stories.docsDescription: The composed shell owns its list. Host apps that need list/table presentation swap use explorer adapters + ContentExplorerController (see docs-site Folder host chrome). Metadata-query browsing is also host-owned — not a controller view mode.

variants.name: Composed shell
variants.note: Shell list is fixed. For list/table swap, compose breadcrumbs + list/table adapters with a shared controller (docs-site Folder host chrome).

stories.title: Components/Collections/Datalist Item
stories.shortDescription: A selectable row for picker lists.
stories.docsDescription: Show a labelled row with optional meta, icon, and selected state.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-datalist-item label="Quarterly Plan.pdf" meta="PDF · 2.1 MB" icon="P" value="123"></box-datalist-item>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-datalist-item label="Quarterly Plan.pdf" meta="PDF · 2.1 MB" icon="P" value="123"></box-datalist-item>

variants.name: Selected
variants.html: <box-datalist-item label="Marketing" meta="Folder · 18 items" icon="M" value="42" selected></box-datalist-item>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Date Field
stories.shortDescription: A labelled date input.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated date field. Pin demo values with `value` (and optional `min` / `max`). Add `clearable` for a reset button (shown only when a date is set) that emits `value-changed` with an empty value.

referenceRows.name: clearable
referenceRows.description: Shows a clear button when a date is set.

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Dialog
stories.shortDescription: A modal dialog for confirmations and focused tasks.
stories.docsDescription: Toggle with `open`. Provide `heading` and optional `description` / `confirm-label` for the primary action. `size` picks the modal width (small / medium / large / fullscreen), and opening locks background page scroll.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-dialog open heading="Delete item?" description="This cannot be undone." confirm-label="Delete"></box-dialog>

referenceRows.name: open
referenceRows.description: Whether the dialog is shown (locks page scroll while open).

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-dialog open heading="Delete item?" description="This cannot be undone." confirm-label="Delete"></box-dialog>

variants.name: Closed
variants.html: <box-dialog heading="Delete item?" description="This cannot be undone." confirm-label="Delete"></box-dialog>

stories.title: Components/Layout/Divider
stories.shortDescription: A horizontal or vertical rule, optionally labelled.
stories.docsDescription: Separates sections. Optional `label` annotates the rule; `orientation` switches axis.

variants.name: In context
variants.html:
Metadata

Owner, shared status, and last activity.

Recent comments

Version history and discussion sit below the rule.

stories.title: Patterns/Insights/Donut Chart
stories.shortDescription: A segmented donut chart for proportional summaries.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `segments` and `actions`; use string attributes for heading, summary, timeframe, and message.

referenceRows.name: segment-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a segment is selected.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-donut-chart heading="Storage by type" summary="100%" timeframe="Current" message="Storage distribution by content category." segments='[{"id":"docs","label":"Documents","value":46},{"id":"media","label":"Media","value":32},{"id":"other","label":"Other","value":22}]' actions='[{"id":"open-breakdown","label":"Open breakdown","tone":"primary"}]'></box-donut-chart>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Draggable List
stories.shortDescription: A reorderable list with pointer and keyboard drag controls.
stories.docsDescription: Pass saved view rows as JSON `items`; reordering emits `reorder` with the new item order.

referenceRows.name: reorder
referenceRows.description: Emitted with moved value, indexes, and reordered items.

variants.name: Default
variants.note: Focus a handle, then ArrowUp/ArrowDown (or drag) to reorder.

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Drawer
stories.shortDescription: A side panel overlay for details and tasks.
stories.docsDescription: Toggle with `open`. Set `heading` and optional `description` / `position`.

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-drawer heading="Details" description="Item metadata and activity." open></box-drawer>

stories.title: Components/Files/Drop Zone
stories.shortDescription: A drag-and-drop upload target.
stories.docsDescription: Invite files with a label and supporting message.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-drop-zone label="Upload files" message="Drag files here or browse."></box-drop-zone>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-drop-zone label="Upload files" message="Drag files here or browse."></box-drop-zone>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Dropdown
stories.shortDescription: A labelled menu button for choosing one item.
stories.docsDescription: Provide entries as JSON `items` (`id`/`label`) and the selected `value` (item id). The open menu is positioned as a viewport-fixed overlay (via the shared `foundations/overlay` primitive), so it escapes ancestor `overflow: hidden` and flips above the trigger when there's no room below. Set `placement` (e.g. `top-start`) to steer it.

referenceRows.name: placement
referenceRows.description: Preferred menu side/align, e.g. bottom-start (default), top-start.

referenceRows.name: value-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted with { value, item } when a choice is made.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Dual Listbox
stories.shortDescription: A transfer list for choosing multiple options.
stories.docsDescription: Provide `options` and selected `value` as JSON arrays.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Empty State
stories.shortDescription: A heading + message for empty result surfaces.
stories.docsDescription: Use when a list or panel has nothing to show. Prefer `heading` + `message`; optional `action-label` for a recovery CTA.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-empty-state heading="No results" message="Try a different search."></box-empty-state>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-empty-state heading="No results" message="Try a different search or clear the filters."></box-empty-state>

variants.name: With action
variants.html: <box-empty-state heading="Folder empty" message="Upload a file to get started." action-label="Upload"></box-empty-state>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Error Mask
stories.shortDescription: A full-section error recovery surface.
stories.docsDescription: Use when a region failed to load. Provide `heading`, `message`, and optional `action-label`. Slot additional markup (diagnostic details, a support link) as the default children — it renders below the message.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-error-mask heading="Couldn't load files" message="Something went wrong." action-label="Retry"></box-error-mask>

referenceRows.name: (default)
referenceRows.description: Rich body content below the message.

referenceRows.name: retry
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the action button is activated.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-error-mask heading="Couldn't load files" message="Something went wrong while loading this folder." action-label="Retry"></box-error-mask>

stories.title: Patterns/Content Explorer/Explorer Action Menu
stories.shortDescription: Per-item action menu bound to a controller + itemId.
stories.docsDescription: Requires `controller` and `itemId`; actions come from the controller's itemActions config.

variants.name: Connected item
variants.note: itemId=123 (Quarterly Plan.pdf) with Share / Download actions.

stories.title: Patterns/Content Explorer/Explorer Breadcrumbs
stories.shortDescription: Breadcrumb trail driven by a ContentExplorerController.
stories.docsDescription: Assign `controller` and connect; crumbs call `navigateTo` on the controller.

stories.title: Patterns/Content Explorer/Explorer Items
stories.shortDescription: List adapter alias used by composed explorer shells.
stories.docsDescription: Same contract as box-explorer-list; assign `controller`.

stories.title: Patterns/Content Explorer/Explorer List
stories.shortDescription: Listbox presentation adapter for explorer items.
stories.docsDescription: Assign `controller`; optional `item-gesture` controls select vs activate.

variants.name: Connected
variants.note: Enriched item meta from the mock transport.

stories.title: Patterns/Content Explorer/Explorer Table
stories.shortDescription: Table presentation with enriched summary columns.
stories.docsDescription: Assign `controller`; columns show Name, Type, Modified, Size, Owner, Shared, Actions.

variants.name: Connected
variants.note: Enriched columns from the mock transport.

stories.title: Patterns/Content Explorer/Explorer Toolbar
stories.shortDescription: Search field, status, and selection actions for an explorer session.
stories.docsDescription: Assign `controller`; embeds box-search-field and wires search/clear/refresh.

variants.name: Connected
variants.note: Live controller with mock transport and a selected file.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Fieldset
stories.shortDescription: A labelled grouping for related form controls.
stories.docsDescription: Use `label` and optional `description`; slotted controls remain in light DOM and mirror `disabled` from the group.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-fieldset label="File details" description="Group related file metadata fields."></box-fieldset>

referenceRows.name: description
referenceRows.description: Optional helper text for the group.

referenceRows.name: disabled
referenceRows.description: Disables the group and mirrors to slotted controls.

variants.name: Default
variants.html:
<box-fieldset label="File details" description="Group related file metadata fields.">
  <box-text-field label="Name" value="Quarterly Plan"></box-text-field>
  <box-text-field label="Owner" value="Morgan Lee"></box-text-field>
</box-fieldset>

stories.title: Patterns/File Request/File Request Builder
stories.shortDescription: A builder for collecting files from external parties.
stories.docsDescription: Pass request `fields` and `settings` as JSON arrays.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-file-request-builder heading="Collect vendor W-9s" message="Request tax forms from onboarding vendors." fields='[{"id":"company","label":"Company name","required":true}]'></box-file-request-builder>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-file-request-builder heading="Collect vendor W-9s" message="Request tax forms from onboarding vendors." fields='[{"id":"company","label":"Company name","required":true},{"id":"w9","label":"W-9 upload","description":"PDF only","required":true}]' settings='[{"id":"due","label":"Due date","description":"Jul 31, 2026"},{"id":"notify","label":"Email notifications","description":"On upload"}]'></box-file-request-builder>

stories.title: Patterns/Search/Filter Bar
stories.shortDescription: A search filter surface with query, sort, view, and facet chips.
stories.docsDescription: Use JSON option attributes for filters, sort choices, and view choices; selected filters serialize as JSON `filters`.

referenceRows.name: value-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when query, sort, view, or filters change.

referenceRows.name: search
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the query is committed.

stories.title: Patterns/Governance/Governance Panel
stories.shortDescription: A governance summary panel for policies and signals.
stories.docsDescription: Use string status/copy attributes with JSON `policies`, `signals`, and `actions`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-governance-panel heading="Governance" status="Compliant" message="Retention and classification policies applied."></box-governance-panel>

referenceRows.name: policy-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a policy row is selected.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-governance-panel heading="Governance" status="Compliant" message="Retention and classification policies applied." policies='[{"label":"Retention","value":"7 years","description":"Finance default"},{"label":"Classification","value":"Internal"}]' signals='[{"label":"Legal hold","tone":"warning"}]' actions='[{"id":"audit","label":"View audit log","tone":"primary"}]'></box-governance-panel>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Grid View
stories.shortDescription: A selectable gallery view for files, folders, and links.
stories.docsDescription: Pass tile data as JSON `items`; `value` marks the selected tile and updates via `value-changed`.

referenceRows.name: items
referenceRows.description: Array of { value, label, meta, icon } tiles.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-grid-view label="Files" value="123" items='[{"value":"123","label":"Quarterly Plan.pdf","meta":"PDF · 2.1 MB","icon":"P"},{"value":"124","label":"Brand Guidelines.pdf","meta":"PDF · 5.4 MB","icon":"P"},{"value":"42","label":"Marketing","meta":"Folder · 18 items","icon":"M"},{"value":"125","label":"box.com/launch","meta":"Web link","icon":"L"}]'></box-grid-view>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Help Text
stories.shortDescription: Inline supporting guidance for a field or section.
stories.docsDescription: Passive help copy with optional `tone`. Pair near the control it explains; keep messages short. With `tone="error"` it becomes an inline validation error — announced assertively via `role="alert"` — instead of the passive `role="note"`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-help-text label="Shared links" message="Shared links expire after 30 days."></box-help-text>

referenceRows.name: tone
referenceRows.description: Emphasis; error announces as an alert.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-help-text label="Shared links" message="Shared links expire after 30 days."></box-help-text>

variants.name: Warning
variants.html: <box-help-text label="Permissions" message="Editors can reshare this folder." tone="warning"></box-help-text>

variants.name: Error
variants.html: <box-help-text message="Enter a valid email address." tone="error"></box-help-text>

stories.title: Components/Actions/Icon Button
stories.shortDescription: An icon-only action with an accessible label.
stories.docsDescription: A compact action rendering a single glyph; the required `label` provides the accessible name.

stories.title: Components/Visuals/Illustration
stories.shortDescription: A registered empty/education illustration with optional copy.
stories.docsDescription: Resolves `asset` from the active design system (e.g. `empty-state-folder`). Pair with `heading` + `message` for empty states.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-illustration asset="empty-state-folder" heading="Nothing here yet" message="Upload a file to get started."></box-illustration>

variants.name: Empty folder
variants.html: <box-illustration asset="empty-state-folder" heading="Nothing here yet" message="Upload a file to get started."></box-illustration>

variants.name: Files information
variants.html: <box-illustration asset="files-information" heading="About these files" message="Details appear when you select an item."></box-illustration>

stories.title: Patterns/Share/Invite Collaborators Modal
stories.shortDescription: A modal workflow for inviting collaborators.
stories.docsDescription: Open the modal with `open`; set `item-id`, optional `heading`, and an invite transport property in app code.

referenceRows.name: submitted
referenceRows.description: Emitted after a successful invite submit.

referenceRows.name: cancel
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the modal is dismissed.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-invite-collaborators-modal item-id="42" heading="Invite people" submit-label="Send invites" open></box-invite-collaborators-modal>
variants.note: A transport property is required for submission; the open attribute exposes the static modal form for reference.

stories.title: Patterns/Item/Item Details Panel
stories.shortDescription: A metadata and action panel for a selected item.
stories.docsDescription: Combine item summary attributes with JSON `owner`, `meta`, and `actions` for a complete details panel.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-item-details-panel heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf" eyebrow="PDF · 2.4 MB" status="Shared" message="Latest board-ready plan with updated forecasts." owner='{"name":"Morgan Lee","description":"Enterprise Admin","status":"Owner"}' meta='[{"label":"Owner","value":"Morgan Lee"},{"label":"Modified","value":"Jul 10, 2026"}]' actions='[{"id":"share","label":"Share"},{"id":"download","label":"Download"}]'></box-item-details-panel>

stories.title: Patterns/Item/Item Form
stories.shortDescription: A schema-driven item properties form.
stories.docsDescription: Pass form schema through JSON `fields` and current field values through JSON `value`; edit mode emits submit/cancel events.

referenceRows.name: value
referenceRows.description: Current field values keyed by field id.

referenceRows.name: value-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a field value changes.

referenceRows.name: submit
referenceRows.description: Emitted with current values on submit.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-item-form label="File properties" submit-label="Save properties" fields='[{"id":"name","label":"Name","section":"Details"},{"id":"status","label":"Status","section":"Details"},{"id":"description","label":"Description","section":"Details","type":"textarea"}]' value='{"name":"Quarterly Plan.pdf","status":"Final","description":"Latest board-ready plan with updated forecasts."}'></box-item-form>

stories.title: Patterns/Insights/Line Chart
stories.shortDescription: A trend chart for activity over time.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `points`, `legend`, and `actions`; use string attributes for heading, summary, timeframe, and message.

referenceRows.name: point-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a point is selected.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-line-chart heading="Active users" summary="431 users" timeframe="Last 5 weeks" message="Weekly active users by reporting period." points='[{"id":"w1","label":"W1","value":310},{"id":"w2","label":"W2","value":355},{"id":"w3","label":"W3","value":348},{"id":"w4","label":"W4","value":402},{"id":"w5","label":"W5","value":431}]' legend='[{"label":"Active users","tone":"brand","value":"431"}]' actions='[{"id":"open-report","label":"Open report","tone":"primary"}]'></box-line-chart>

stories.title: Components/Actions/Link Button
stories.shortDescription: A button-styled link for navigation actions.
stories.docsDescription: Renders an anchor with Box button tones. Requires a safe `href`; the accessible name comes from `label`.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Menu Item
stories.shortDescription: A single menu row for composed menus.
stories.docsDescription: Use inside custom menu compositions when you are not driving `box-menu` from JSON `items`.

stories.title: Components/Actions/Menu
stories.shortDescription: An action menu driven by a JSON item list.
stories.docsDescription: Provide menu entries as JSON `items`. Beyond plain actions (`id`/`label`, optional `disabled`), an item can be a `header` (section label), carry a `separator` (divider before it), be a link (`href`), or be checkable (`checked` → menuitemcheckbox with a ✓).

referenceRows.name: items
referenceRows.description: Array of { id, label, disabled?, header?, separator?, href?, checked? }.

referenceRows.name: item-selected
referenceRows.description: Fires with the chosen item (checkable items toggle aria-checked).

stories.title: Patterns/Metadata/Metadata Filter Builder
stories.shortDescription: A rule builder for metadata search filters.
stories.docsDescription: Pass available metadata fields as JSON `fields` and active filter rules as JSON `rules`.

stories.title: Patterns/Metadata/Metadata Inspector
stories.shortDescription: A sectioned inspector for item metadata fields.
stories.docsDescription: Set heading context and pass metadata sections as JSON `sections`; field selections emit `field-selected`.

referenceRows.name: field-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a metadata field row is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-metadata-inspector heading="Metadata" eyebrow="Quarterly Plan.pdf" message="Review classification and retention metadata before sharing." sections='[{"title":"Classification","fields":[{"label":"Confidentiality","value":"Internal"},{"label":"Department","value":"Marketing"}]},{"title":"Retention","fields":[{"label":"Policy","value":"FY26 Launch","description":"7-year retention schedule"}]}]'></box-metadata-inspector>

stories.title: Patterns/Insights/Metric Card
stories.shortDescription: A KPI card with optional trend.
stories.docsDescription: Surface a headline metric; pass optional JSON `trend` for delta tone/label.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-metric-card heading="Active shared links" value="1,284" eyebrow="Last 30 days" status="Healthy" trend='{"label":"+16.5%","tone":"success"}'></box-metric-card>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-metric-card heading="Active shared links" value="1,284" eyebrow="Last 30 days" message="Up from 1,102 in the prior period." status="Healthy" trend='{"label":"+16.5%","tone":"success"}'></box-metric-card>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Multi Select
stories.shortDescription: A multi-value select field.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated multi-select. `options` is JSON; `value` is a JSON array of selected values.

stories.title: Components/Layout/Nav Sidebar
stories.shortDescription: A labelled, collapsible navigation rail for workspace shells.
stories.docsDescription: Slot header, navigation rows, and footer content; pair icon/label spans with `data-nav-icon` and `data-nav-label` for collapsed rails.

referenceRows.name: collapsed
referenceRows.description: Shrinks the rail and exposes the icon-strip state.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: 2.4 GB of 10 GB used
variants.note: Wire the toggle event to `collapsed` in host code; labels hide through `--boe-nav-label-display`.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Nudge
stories.shortDescription: A dismissible tip with an optional action.
stories.docsDescription: Inline coaching surface with `heading`, `message`, optional `action-label`, and `open`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-nudge heading="Try grid view" message="Preview files as thumbnails." action-label="Show me"></box-nudge>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-nudge open heading="Try grid view" message="Preview files as thumbnails from the view switcher." action-label="Show me"></box-nudge>

variants.name: No action
variants.html: <box-nudge open heading="Tip" message="Use filters to narrow results."></box-nudge>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Number Input
stories.shortDescription: A labelled numeric field with optional bounds.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated number entry. Use `min` / `max` / `value` with an accessible `label`.

variants.name: Disabled
variants.html: <box-number-input label="Page size" value="25" min="1" max="100" disabled></box-number-input>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Pagination
stories.shortDescription: Previous/next paging with a summary.
stories.docsDescription: Drive paging with `page`, `page-size`, and `total-items`.

stories.title: Patterns/Share/Permission Matrix
stories.shortDescription: A permission selector matrix for people and groups.
stories.docsDescription: Render subjects with selectable role options using JSON `options`, `subjects`, and `value` attributes.

referenceRows.name: subjects
referenceRows.description: People or groups shown as rows.

referenceRows.name: value
referenceRows.description: Subject id to selected role value map.

referenceRows.name: value-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the role map changes.

referenceRows.name: subject-role-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted with the changed subject and role value.

stories.title: Components/Identity/Persona
stories.shortDescription: An avatar with name and supporting copy.
stories.docsDescription: Identity row for a person: `name` plus optional `description` / `subtitle` and avatar fields.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Pill Cloud
stories.shortDescription: A multi-select cloud of toggle pills for filters.
stories.docsDescription: Pass selectable facets as JSON `options`; `value` is a JSON string array of selected option values.

referenceRows.name: options
referenceRows.description: Array of { value, label, disabled } options.

referenceRows.name: value
referenceRows.description: Selected values as a string array.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Pill Selector Dropdown
stories.shortDescription: A multi-select pill field with an add menu.
stories.docsDescription: Pass people/options as JSON `options`; selected pills are the JSON array `value`. Set `allow-custom` to turn it into a collaborator/email token input: type + Enter/comma create a pill, Backspace removes the last, and pasting a comma/newline list creates several at once. A `pattern` (regex) validates each entry — invalid ones are rejected and emit `invalid-entry`.

referenceRows.name: value
referenceRows.description: Selected values as a string array.

referenceRows.name: pattern
referenceRows.description: Regex each custom entry must match (e.g. an email).

referenceRows.name: invalid-entry
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a custom entry fails the pattern.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-pill-selector-dropdown label="Collaborators" placeholder="Add person" options='[{"value":"morgan","label":"Morgan Lee"},{"value":"alex","label":"Alex Kim"},{"value":"sam","label":"Sam Patel"},{"value":"jordan","label":"Jordan Rivera"}]' value='["morgan"]'></box-pill-selector-dropdown>

variants.name: Email token input
variants.html: <box-pill-selector-dropdown label="Invite by email" placeholder="Type an email" allow-custom pattern="[^@\s]+@[^@\s]+\.[^@\s]+" value='["morgan@box.com"]'></box-pill-selector-dropdown>

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Popover
stories.shortDescription: A small anchored overlay for extra info or actions.
stories.docsDescription: Toggle with `open`. `label` names the trigger; light-DOM children are the popover body.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-popover label="More info" placement="top" open>Shared links expire automatically.</box-popover>

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-popover label="More info" placement="top" open>Shared links expire automatically.</box-popover>

variants.name: Closed
variants.html: <box-popover label="More info" placement="top">Shared links expire automatically.</box-popover>

stories.title: Patterns/Share/Presence
stories.shortDescription: A live-presence avatar pile for people on an item.
stories.docsDescription: Set `label` and `max` as attributes; live roster data is supplied through the `users` or `transport` properties.

variants.name: Default
variants.note: Presence rosters are properties, so serialized HTML can only show the labelled empty state.

stories.title: Patterns/Preview/Preview Element
stories.shortDescription: A provider-neutral preview workspace shell.
stories.docsDescription: Use attributes for shell copy plus JSON `provider`, `adapter-state`, and `actions`; slot toolbar, stage, and sidebar content.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-preview-element heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf" item-label="PDF - 2.4 MB" status="Ready" provider='{"id":"content-preview","label":"Box Content Preview","engine":"pdf.js","status":"ready"}'></box-preview-element>

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a shell action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: Preview stage

stories.title: Patterns/Item/Preview Header
stories.shortDescription: A preview title header with breadcrumbs, status, and actions.
stories.docsDescription: Set preview heading/status/message attributes and pass breadcrumbs plus action buttons as JSON.

referenceRows.name: breadcrumb-selected
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a breadcrumb is selected.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-preview-header heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf" status="Shared" message="Rendered by the active preview provider." breadcrumbs='[{"id":"0","label":"All Files"},{"id":"42","label":"Marketing"}]' actions='[{"id":"share","label":"Share"},{"id":"download","label":"Download"}]'></box-preview-header>

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Progress Bar
stories.shortDescription: A determinate progress indicator.
stories.docsDescription: A horizontal bar showing completion from 0–100 with an accessible label.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Progress Ring
stories.shortDescription: A circular determinate progress indicator.
stories.docsDescription: Shows completion with `value` (and optional `max`) plus an accessible `label`.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Progress Steps
stories.shortDescription: A stepped progress indicator.
stories.docsDescription: Pass steps as JSON `items` and the active `value`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Radio Group
stories.shortDescription: A labelled set of mutually exclusive choices.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated radio group. Provide choices as JSON `options` and the selected `value`. Each option may carry a `description` (supporting subsection under its label) and a `disabled` flag to make that single choice inert.

referenceRows.name: options
referenceRows.description: Array of { label, value, description?, disabled? }.

variants.name: With descriptions
variants.html: <box-radio-group label="Access level" options='[{"label":"Company","value":"company","description":"Anyone at your company can find and open this."},{"label":"Invited people only","value":"invited","description":"Only people you invite can open this."},{"label":"Public","value":"public","description":"Requires an admin to enable.","disabled":true}]' value="company"></box-radio-group>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Range Slider
stories.shortDescription: A dual-thumb numeric range control.
stories.docsDescription: Set `start`/`end` within `min`/`max` for a bounded range.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-range-slider label="Size range" min="0" max="100" start="20" end="80"></box-range-slider>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-range-slider label="Size range" min="0" max="100" start="20" end="80"></box-range-slider>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Rating
stories.shortDescription: A star-style rating control.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated rating with `value` out of `max` and an accessible `label`.

stories.title: Patterns/Task/Review Queue Item
stories.shortDescription: A review-queue row with assignee and metrics.
stories.docsDescription: Combine heading/status attributes with JSON `assignee`, `metrics`, and `actions`.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-review-queue-item heading="MSA_Acme_v4.pdf" item-label="Contract" status="Awaiting review" priority="Medium" due-date="Jul 14, 2026"></box-review-queue-item>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-review-queue-item heading="MSA_Acme_v4.pdf" item-label="Contract" status="Awaiting review" priority="Medium" due-date="Jul 14, 2026" message="Second-pass legal review." assignee='{"name":"Morgan Lee","role":"Legal"}' metrics='[{"label":"Pages","value":"34"},{"label":"Comments","value":"6"}]' actions='[{"id":"open","label":"Open"},{"id":"approve","label":"Approve","tone":"primary"}]'></box-review-queue-item>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Rich Text Input
stories.shortDescription: A form-associated rich text editor with a compact toolbar.
stories.docsDescription: Use `label`, optional `placeholder`, and sanitized HTML `value` for editable formatted content.

stories.title: Patterns/Search/Saved View Picker
stories.shortDescription: A radiogroup-style picker for saved search views.
stories.docsDescription: Pass saved views as JSON `views`; `value` selects the active saved view and updates via `value-changed`.

referenceRows.name: value-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a saved view is selected.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Search Field
stories.shortDescription: A labelled search input with clear affordance.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated search field for queries. Use `label` for the accessible name; clear resets the value.

referenceRows.name: loading
referenceRows.description: Shows a spinner in the submit button while a search runs.

referenceRows.name: search
referenceRows.description: Fired on Enter / submit; also requests the containing form's submission.

stories.title: Patterns/Search/Search Results Header
stories.shortDescription: A search summary header with filters and actions.
stories.docsDescription: Set query/count context as attributes and pass active filters plus header actions as JSON.

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an action is selected.

referenceRows.name: filter-removed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when an active filter chip is removed.

stories.title: Components/Layout/Section
stories.shortDescription: A titled content section with optional actions.
stories.docsDescription: Use eyebrow/heading/description attributes and slots for actions and body content.

</box-section>

stories.title: Components/Actions/Segmented Control
stories.shortDescription: A compact mutually exclusive choice control.
stories.docsDescription: Provide segment definitions as JSON `options` and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Select
stories.shortDescription: A single-select dropdown field.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated select. Provide choices as JSON `options` and the current `value`.

stories.title: Components/Layout/Sidebar Toggle Button
stories.shortDescription: A disclosure button for expanding or collapsing a companion sidebar.
stories.docsDescription: Set `label` and optional `controls`; activation toggles `expanded` and emits `toggle` for the host to wire to a sidebar.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: 2.4 GB of 10 GB used
variants.note: Host listens for `toggle` and sets the sidebar `collapsed` attribute.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Skeleton
stories.shortDescription: A placeholder block for loading layouts.
stories.docsDescription: Reserves space with `width` and `height` while content loads.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Slider
stories.shortDescription: A labelled range slider.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated slider with `value` between `min` and `max`.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Spin Button
stories.shortDescription: A numeric stepper control.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated spinbutton with `value` between optional `min` / `max`.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Spinner
stories.shortDescription: An indeterminate loading indicator.
stories.docsDescription: A looping indicator for indeterminate waits. The `label` names it for assistive technology.

referenceRows.name: size
referenceRows.description: Indicator size: small, medium (default), or large.

stories.title: Components/Layout/Split View
stories.shortDescription: A two-pane layout with optional pointer resizing.
stories.docsDescription: Slot primary content into `primary`, place secondary content in the default slot, and use `ratio` plus `resizable` to control the split.

referenceRows.name: ratio-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the separator changes the ratio.

variants.name: Default
variants.html:
<box-split-view label="Master detail" ratio="0.4" resizable>
  <box-grid-view slot="primary" label="Files" value="123" items='[{"value":"123","label":"Quarterly Plan.pdf","meta":"PDF · 2.1 MB","icon":"P"},{"value":"124","label":"Brand Guidelines.pdf","meta":"PDF · 5.4 MB","icon":"P"},{"value":"42","label":"Marketing","meta":"Folder · 18 items","icon":"M"}]'></box-grid-view>
  <box-item-details-panel heading="Quarterly Plan.pdf" eyebrow="PDF · 2.4 MB" owner='{"name":"Morgan Lee","description":"Enterprise Admin"}' meta='[{"label":"Modified","value":"Jul 10, 2026"},{"label":"Status","value":"Shared"}]'></box-item-details-panel>
</box-split-view>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Switch
stories.shortDescription: A binary on/off toggle.
stories.docsDescription: A labelled toggle for an immediate boolean setting; emits `change` with the new state.

variants.name: With description
variants.html: <box-switch label="Shared links" description="Anyone with the link can view" checked></box-switch>

stories.title: Components/Navigation/Tabs
stories.shortDescription: A compact tablist for switching between peer views.
stories.docsDescription: Provide `options` and `value`. Use `layout="attached"` for a segmented track; `separated` for independent tab buttons.

referenceRows.name: value-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the selected tab changes.

stories.title: Components/Forms/Tag Input
stories.shortDescription: A token field for labels and tags.
stories.docsDescription: Provide committed tags via the comma-separated `value` attribute.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-tag-input label="Labels" placeholder="Add a label" value="marketing, q3, launch"></box-tag-input>

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-tag-input label="Labels" placeholder="Add a label" value="marketing, q3, launch"></box-tag-input>

stories.title: Patterns/Task/Task Assignment Panel
stories.shortDescription: A task assignment panel with assignees and checklist state.
stories.docsDescription: Use JSON `assignees`, `checklist`, and `actions`; set task metadata with string attributes.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-task-assignment-panel heading="Contract review" status="In progress" priority="High" due-date="Jul 18, 2026"></box-task-assignment-panel>

referenceRows.name: assignee-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the assignee selection changes.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-task-assignment-panel heading="Contract review" status="In progress" priority="High" due-date="Jul 18, 2026" message="Legal review before countersign." current-assignee-id="morgan" assignees='[{"id":"morgan","name":"Morgan Lee","description":"Legal","status":"Active"},{"id":"alex","name":"Alex Kim","description":"Procurement"}]' checklist='[{"id":"terms","label":"Review terms","checked":true},{"id":"redlines","label":"Resolve redlines"}]' actions='[{"id":"approve","label":"Approve","tone":"primary"},{"id":"reassign","label":"Reassign"}]'></box-task-assignment-panel>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Text Area
stories.shortDescription: A multi-line labelled text input.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated textarea with `label`, optional `placeholder` / `rows`, and validation hooks.

variants.name: Filled
variants.html: <box-text-area label="Notes" rows="4" value="Looks good to merge."></box-text-area>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Text Field
stories.shortDescription: A single-line labelled text input.
stories.docsDescription: Form-associated text input with label, optional placeholder, and validation hooks (`invalid`, `error-message`).

referenceRows.name: type
referenceRows.description: Input type: text (default), email, tel, url, password, search, number.

referenceRows.name: loading
referenceRows.description: Shows a trailing spinner (e.g. async validation).

referenceRows.name: change
referenceRows.description: Fired when the value is committed.

variants.name: Invalid
variants.html: <box-text-field label="Folder name" value="" invalid error-message="Name is required"></box-text-field>

variants.name: With leading icon
variants.html: <box-text-field label="Search" placeholder="Find files"><svg slot="icon" viewBox="0 0 16 16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M7 2a5 5 0 013.9 8.1l3 3-1.4 1.4-3-3A5 5 0 117 2zm0 2a3 3 0 100 6 3 3 0 000-6z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></box-text-field>

stories.title: Components/Forms/Time Field
stories.shortDescription: A time-of-day input.
stories.docsDescription: Use a 24-hour `value` string such as `09:30`. `setTimeString(str)` parses human 12h/24h input (`"1:30 PM"`, `"9 am"`, `"13:45"`) to canonical HH:MM, emitting `parse-error` when it can't (the static `parseTime` exposes the same logic).

referenceRows.name: setTimeString(str)
referenceRows.description: Parse a 12h/24h string into the value; returns false + emits parse-error on failure.

referenceRows.name: parse-error
referenceRows.description: Emitted when setTimeString cannot parse the input.

stories.title: Components/Feedback/Toast
stories.shortDescription: A transient status message.
stories.docsDescription: Shows a short `message` with an optional tone. Toggle visibility with `open`, or call `show(message, { duration, tone })`. A declarative `duration` (ms) auto-dismisses the toast; slot an `action` (e.g. an Undo button/link) before the dismiss control. Long unbroken tokens wrap instead of overflowing.

referenceRows.name: duration
referenceRows.description: Auto-dismiss delay in ms for the declarative open path (0 = sticky).

referenceRows.name: action
referenceRows.description: Action affordance (e.g. Undo) before the dismiss button.

referenceRows.name: dismiss
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the toast is dismissed.

variants.name: With action
variants.html: <box-toast open message="File deleted" tone="info"><button slot="action" type="button">Undo</button></box-toast>

stories.title: Components/Overlays/Tooltip
stories.shortDescription: A short hover/focus hint for a control.
stories.docsDescription: Associates a concise `label` tip with a trigger. The tip is positioned as a viewport-fixed overlay (via the shared `foundations/overlay` primitive), so it escapes ancestor `overflow: hidden` and flips/shifts to stay on-screen. Set `placement` (e.g. `top-center`, `right-start`) to steer it, `theme` (`error`, `callout`) to recolor it, and slot rich content into `content` for image or multi-line tips. Use `open` to force visibility in demos.

referenceRows.name: placement
referenceRows.description: Preferred side/align, e.g. bottom-center, top-start, right-center. Default bottom-center.

referenceRows.name: theme
referenceRows.description: Visual theme: default (dark), error, or callout (light).

referenceRows.name: trigger-label
referenceRows.description: Accessible name for the demo trigger.

referenceRows.name: content
referenceRows.description: Rich tip body (image, multiple lines) shown after the label.

variants.name: Open
variants.html: <box-tooltip label="Rename this item" open trigger-label="More actions"></box-tooltip>

variants.name: Placement: top
variants.html: <box-tooltip label="Appears above the trigger" placement="top-center" open trigger-label="More actions"></box-tooltip>

variants.name: Error theme
variants.html: <box-tooltip label="This field is required" theme="error" open trigger-label="Field help"></box-tooltip>

variants.name: Callout theme
variants.html: <box-tooltip label="Rich hint on a light surface" theme="callout" open trigger-label="More info"></box-tooltip>

stories.title: Components/Collections/Tree Grid
stories.shortDescription: A hierarchical grid with expandable rows and selectable items.
stories.docsDescription: Pass JSON `columns` and nested `items`; branches start expanded and expose selection plus expand events.

referenceRows.name: items
referenceRows.description: Nested rows with value, label, cells, and children.

referenceRows.name: expand-changed
referenceRows.description: Emitted when a branch expands or collapses.

variants.name: Default
variants.note: Column/item shapes follow the component's `columns` and `items` attributes.

stories.title: Components/Collections/Tree
stories.shortDescription: A hierarchical folder/tree navigator.
stories.docsDescription: Provide nested nodes as JSON `items` and the selected `value`.

stories.title: Patterns/Share/Unified Share Modal
stories.shortDescription: A modal for shared-link and collaborator settings.
stories.docsDescription: Open the modal with `open`; connect a `dataSource` property in app code to load link and collaborator state.
stories.sourceSnippet: <box-unified-share-modal item-id="42" item-type="file" heading="Share Quarterly Plan.pdf" open></box-unified-share-modal>

referenceRows.name: invite
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the invite affordance is used.

referenceRows.name: linkcopied
referenceRows.description: Emitted after a successful link copy.

referenceRows.name: close
referenceRows.description: Emitted when the modal is dismissed.

variants.name: Default
variants.html: <box-unified-share-modal item-id="42" item-type="file" heading="Share Quarterly Plan.pdf" open></box-unified-share-modal>
variants.note: A dataSource property is required for loaded share settings; serialized HTML shows the open modal shell.
